calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: arc_062 GAP-B behavioural falsifier (MECH-309/ARC-062): rule-creator present-vs-absent, committed-class diversity
items.note: IGW-20260609-004. arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B behavioural falsifier for MECH-309/ARC-062. Single-variable: ARM_OFF (use_candidate_rule_field=False, legacy collapsed rule_state) vs ARM_ON (use_candidate_rule_field=True, differentiated crf_source) -- both on the matched 649 GAP-A (candidate_summary_source=e2_world_forward, e2 trained online in P0) / 643a authority / SD-056 / SP-CEM / MECH-341 stack with the SD-033a bias head un-zeroed (lateral_pfc_train_rule_bias_head=True). PRIMARY DV = COMMITTED-CLASS entropy (mechanistically matched: the rule bias is class-keyed -- per-candidate summary is first-action-keyed + compute_bias broadcasts one rule_state across K, so it cannot move within-class selection; within-class-representative entropy is retained as a SECONDARY NEGATIVE CONTROL, user-confirmed 2026-06-09 overriding the literal brief). C1 (non-vacuity, self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue on fail) = committed-class axis exercisable + GAP-A consumed-summary divergence real (both arms) + ARM_ON minted >=2 distinct rules firing a non-zero rule_state; C2 (PRIMARY) = paired-by-seed ARM_ON > ARM_OFF committed-class entropy lift >=2/3 seeds -> supports; C1-ok/C2-fail -> weakens. evidence_direction_per_claim covers MECH-309 + ARC-062. P0=60 ep e2-train (frozen P1=60 ep measure); SD-056 rollout-norm clamp ON. dry-run smoke PASS (correct substrate_not_ready_requeue self-route at dry scale). queue-race note: rebuilt on origin/main 8ce59e8 after a phase3-queue snapshot re-materialised 655-claimed mid-append.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization-necessity: task-distribution-shift phase-3 redesign (supersedes 610f)
items.note: IGW-20260609-038 / failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610f_2026-06-08 user-confirmed route (a). Replaces the noise-only phase-3 with a genuine TASK-DISTRIBUTION SHIFT (SD-054 reef-bipartite layout + hazard_food_attraction=0.8 -> flee-to-reef single dominant optimum conflicting with the phase-0-2 forage policy) so the un-crystallized control suffers catastrophic forgetting (D2 collapse) while the EWC-anchored arm resists (D1). reef_enabled in all phases keeps world_obs_dim=275 constant. Decisive substrate-incapacity fork pre-registered: if D2 still fails on a genuine task-shift -> accept INV-074 substrate_ceiling and STOP the 610 cascade. 5 arms x 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 2500 ep x 200 steps; verified wiring (_assert_fixes_wired) + D3 non-vacuity gate carried from 610f.

items.title: Stage-H harm-pathway training validation: 3-arm harm-pathway ablation (HARM_OFF_NAV negative control / HARM_ON_NAV headline / HARM_ON_MIDLINE) x 3 seeds -- does training the untrained hazard-avoidance valuation pathway (E3.harm_eval_head(z_world)+encoder, z_harm, z_harm_a, E2_harm_s) lift Stage-H survival from the 603i G_H=0 nav-competence ceiling?
items.note: Substrate-readiness diagnostic (claim_ids=[]) for the scaffolded_sd054_onboarding Stage-H harm-pathway training amend (2026-06-09). Root cause (code+probe): the curriculum trains only E1 + E2.world_forward; E3.harm_eval_head(z_world) -- the harm cost scoring every trajectory -- is a random constant ~0.523, so the agent navigates a random harm landscape and dies handed the reef (603i G_H 0/3). Amend trains the pathway in P0+Stage-H (use_harm_stream+use_e2_harm_s_forward so all 4 terms engage). Acceptance: ARM_HARM_ON_NAV G_H>=2/3 (median last-window>=75) AND ARM_HARM_OFF_NAV (negative control = 603i nav control) G_H frac<0.5 AND harm pathway trained. PASS unblocks the SD-059/MECH-358 escape-affordance-bridge retest + GAP-2 survival-leg cohort; substrate_queue ready stays false until PASS. Activation smoke at reduced budget: ARM_HARM_ON_NAV survival_gate_passed=True (median 80 vs gate 75) vs OFF 23. 97/97 scaffold contracts + 7/7 preflight + validate_experiments --strict OK + dry-run end-to-end PASS. Coordination: parallel sessions also touch this queue (603j safety-half, 653 e2-escape-linker, 654 arc062 GAP-B) -- distinct ids; pathspec/atomic-commit mitigation applied.
